title: Convergence of IT and OT in IoT
description: A flowchart illustrating the integration of Information Technology (IT) systems and Operational Technology (OT) systems through IoT, highlighting their distinct roles and the resulting synergy.
elements: IT Systems (Data Centers, Cloud, Business Apps)
relationships: IT systems send commands and business logic to the IoT Platform
IoT Platform translates and relays data/commands between IT and OT
OT systems monitor and control the Physical World
OT systems send raw operational data to the IoT Platform
IoT Platform sends processed data and insights to IT systems
